original:
śaṅkarēṇa prōktaṃ
śrī mantrarājapadastōtram
śrī mantrarājapadastōtram
śrī īśvara uvāca
vṛttōtphulla viśālākṣaṃ vipakṣakṣayadīkṣitam
ninādatrastaviśvāṇḍaṃ viṣṇuṃ ugraṃ namāmyaham

sarvairavadhyatāṃ prāptaṃ sabalaughaṃ ditēḥ sutam
nakhāgraiḥ śakalīcakrē yastaṃ vīraṃ namāmyaham

padāvaṣṭabdhapātāḻaṃ mūrdhāviṣṭatriviṣṭapam
bhujapraviṣṭāṣṭadiśaṃ mahāviṣṇuṃ namāmyaham

jyōtīṃṣyarkēndu nakṣatrajvalanādīnyanukramāt
jvalanti tējasā yasya taṃ jvalantaṃ namāmyaham
split_lines: jvalanti | tējasā | yasya | taṃ | jvalantaṃ | namāmyaham

original:
sarvēndriyairapi vinā sarvaṃ sarvatra sarvadā
yō jānāti namāmyādyaṃ tamahaṃ sarvatōmukham

naravat siṃhavaccaiva yasya rūpaṃ mahātmanaḥ
mahāsaṭaṃ mahādaṃṣṭram taṃ nṛsiṃhaṃ namāmyaham

yannāmasmaraṇād bhītāḥ bhūtavētāḻarākṣasāḥ
rōgādyāśca praṇaśyanti bhīṣaṇaṃ taṃ namāmyaham

sarvō’pi yaṃ samāśritya sakalaṃ bhadramaśnutē
śriyā ca bhadrayā juṣṭaḥ yastaṃ bhadraṃ namāmyaham
split_lines: śriyā | ca | bhadrayā | juṣṭaḥ | yastaṃ | bhadraṃ | namāmyaham

original:
śrī mantrarājapadastōtram
sākṣāt svakālē saṃprāptaṃ mṛtyuṃ śatrugaṇānvitam
bhaktānāṃ nāśayēd yastu mṛtyumṛtyuṃ namāmyaham

namaskārātmakaṃ yasmai vidhāyā’’tmanivēdanam
tyaktaduḥkhō’khilān kāmān aśnantaṃ taṃ namāmyaham

dāsabhūtāḥ svatassarvē hyātmānaḥ paramātmanaḥ
atō’hamapi tē dāsaḥ iti matvā namāmyaham
split_lines: atō’hamapi | tē | dāsaḥ | iti | matvā | namāmyaham

original:
śaṅkarēṇā’’darāt prōktaṃ padānāṃ tattvanirṇayam
trisandhyaṃ yaḥ paṭhēt tasya śrīrvidyā’’yuśca vardhatē
split_lines: trisandhyaṃ | yaḥ | paṭhēt | tasya | śrīrvidyā’’yuśca | vardhatē

title: Dōhā 1
original:
śrī guru charaṇa sarōja raja nijamana mukura sudhāri ।

varaṇau raghuvara vimalayaśa jō dāyaka phalachāri ॥

buddhihīna tanujānikai sumirau pavana kumāra ।

bala buddhi vidyā dēhu mōhi harahu kalēśa vikāra ॥
split_lines: śrī guru charaṇa sarōja raja nijamana mukura sudhāri
varaṇau raghuvara vimalayaśa jō dāyaka phalachāri
bala buddhi vidyā dēhu mōhi harahu kalēśa vikāra

title: Dhyānam 2
original:
atulita baladhāmaṃ svarṇa śailābha dēham ।

danuja vana kṛśānuṃ jñāninā magragaṇyam ॥

sakala guṇa nidhānaṃ vānarāṇā madhīśam ।

raghupati priya bhaktaṃ vātajātaṃ namāmi ॥

title: Verse 3
original:
gōṣpadīkṛta vārāśiṃ maśakīkṛta rākṣasam ।

rāmāyaṇa mahāmālā ratnaṃ vandē-(a)nilātmajam ॥

yatra yatra raghunātha kīrtanaṃ tatra tatra kṛtamastakāñjalim ।

bhāṣpavāri paripūrṇa lōchanaṃ mārutiṃ namata rākṣasāntakam ॥
split_lines: yatra yatra raghunātha kīrtanaṃ tatra tatra kṛtamastakāñjalim
bhāṣpavāri paripūrṇa lōchanaṃ mārutiṃ namata rākṣasāntakam

title: Verse 4
original:
manōjavaṃ māruta tulyavēgam ।

jitēndriyaṃ buddhi matāṃ variṣṭam ॥

vātātmajaṃ vānarayūtha mukhyam ।

śrī rāma dūtaṃ śirasā namāmi ॥

title: Chaupāī 1
original:
jaya hanumāna jñāna guṇa sāgara ।

jaya kapīśa tihu lōka ujāgara ॥ 1 ॥

title: Verse 2
original:
rāmadūta atulita baladhāmā ।

añjani putra pavanasuta nāmā ॥ 2 ॥

title: Verse 3
original:
mahāvīra vikrama bajaraṅgī ।

kumati nivāra sumati kē saṅgī ॥3 ॥

title: Verse 4
original:
kañchana varaṇa virāja suvēśā ।

kānana kuṇḍala kuñchita kēśā ॥ 4 ॥

title: Verse 5
original:
hāthavajra au dhvajā virājai । 

kānthē mūñja janēvū sājai ॥ 5॥

title: Verse 6
original:
śaṅkara suvana kēsarī nandana । 

tēja pratāpa mahājaga vandana ॥ 6 ॥

title: Verse 7
original:
vidyāvāna guṇī ati chātura ।

rāma kāja karivē kō ātura ॥ 7 ॥

title: Verse 8
original:
prabhu charitra sunivē kō rasiyā ।

rāmalakhana sītā mana basiyā ॥ 8॥

title: Verse 9
original:
sūkṣma rūpadhari siyahi dikhāvā ।

vikaṭa rūpadhari laṅka jalāvā ॥ 9 ॥

title: Verse 10
original:
bhīma rūpadhari asura saṃhārē ।

rāmachandra kē kāja saṃvārē ॥ 10 ॥

title: Verse 11
original:
lāya sañjīvana lakhana jiyāyē ।

śrī raghuvīra haraṣi uralāyē ॥ 11 ॥

title: Verse 12
original:
raghupati kīnhī bahuta baḍāyī (ī) ।

tuma mama priya bharata sama bhāyī ॥ 12 ॥
split_lines: tuma mama priya bharata sama bhāyī 12

title: Verse 13
original:
sahasra vadana tumharō yaśagāvai ।

asa kahi śrīpati kaṇṭha lagāvai ॥ 13 ॥

title: Verse 14
original:
sanakādika brahmādi munīśā ।

nārada śārada sahita ahīśā ॥ 14 ॥

title: Verse 15
original:
yama kubēra digapāla jahāṃ tē ।

kavi kōvida kahi sakē kahāṃ tē ॥ 15 ॥
split_lines: kavi kōvida kahi sakē kahāṃ tē 15

title: Verse 16
original:
tuma upakāra sugrīvahi kīnhā ।

rāma milāya rājapada dīnhā ॥ 16 ॥

title: Verse 17
original:
tumharō mantra vibhīṣaṇa mānā ।

laṅkēśvara bhayē saba jaga jānā ॥ 17 ॥

title: Verse 18
original:
yuga sahasra yōjana para bhānū ।

līlyō tāhi madhura phala jānū ॥ 18 ॥

title: Verse 19
original:
prabhu mudrikā mēli mukha māhī ।

jaladhi lāṅghi gayē acharaja nāhī ॥ 19 ॥

title: Verse 20
original:
durgama kāja jagata kē jētē ।

sugama anugraha tumharē tētē ॥ 20 ॥

title: Verse 21
original:
rāma duārē tuma rakhavārē ।

hōta na ājñā binu paisārē ॥ 21 ॥

title: Verse 22
original:
saba sukha lahai tumhārī śaraṇā ।

tuma rakṣaka kāhū kō ḍara nā ॥ 22 ॥
split_lines: tuma rakṣaka kāhū kō ḍara nā 22

title: Verse 23
original:
āpana tēja samhārō āpai ।

tīnōṃ lōka hāṅka tē kāmpai ॥ 23 ॥

title: Verse 24
original:
bhūta piśācha nikaṭa nahi āvai ।

mahavīra jaba nāma sunāvai ॥ 24 ॥

title: Verse 25
original:
nāsai rōga harai saba pīrā ।

japata nirantara hanumata vīrā ॥ 25 ॥

title: Verse 26
original:
saṅkaṭa sē hanumāna Chuḍāvai ।

mana krama vachana dhyāna jō lāvai ॥ 26 ॥
split_lines: mana krama vachana dhyāna jō lāvai 26

title: Verse 27
original:
saba para rāma tapasvī rājā ।

tinakē kāja sakala tuma sājā ॥ 27 ॥

title: Verse 28
original:
aura manōratha jō kōyi lāvai ।

tāsu amita jīvana phala pāvai ॥ 28 ॥

title: Verse 29
original:
chārō yuga pratāpa tumhārā ।

hai parasiddha jagata ujiyārā ॥ 29 ॥

title: Verse 30
original:
sādhu santa kē tuma rakhavārē ।

asura nikandana rāma dulārē ॥ 30 ॥

title: Verse 31
original:
aṣṭhasiddhi nava nidhi kē dātā ।

asa vara dīnha jānakī mātā ॥ 31 ॥

title: Verse 32
original:
rāma rasāyana tumhārē pāsā ।

sadā rahō raghupati kē dāsā ॥ 32 ॥

title: Verse 33
original:
tumharē bhajana rāmakō pāvai ।

janma janma kē dukha bisarāvai ॥ 33 ॥

title: Verse 34
original:
anta kāla raghupati purajāyī । 

jahāṃ janma haribhakta kahāyī ॥ 34 ॥

title: Verse 35
original:
aura dēvatā chitta na dharayī ।

hanumata sēyi sarva sukha karayī ॥ 35 ॥

title: Verse 36
original:
saṅkaṭa ka(ha)ṭai miṭai saba pīrā ।

jō sumirai hanumata bala vīrā ॥ 36 ॥

title: Verse 37
original:
jai jai jai hanumāna gōsāyī ।

kṛpā karahu gurudēva kī nāyī ॥ 37 ॥

title: Verse 38
original:
yaha śata vāra pāṭha kara kōyī । 

Chūṭahi bandi mahā sukha hōyī ॥ 38 ॥
split_lines: yaha śata vāra pāṭha kara kōyī

title: Verse 39
original:
jō yaha paḍai hanumāna chālīsā ।

hōya siddhi sākhī gaurīśā ॥ 39 ॥

title: Verse 40
original:
tulasīdāsa sadā hari chērā ।

kījai nātha hṛdaya maha ḍērā ॥ 40 ॥

title: Dōhā 45
original:
pavana tanaya saṅkaṭa haraṇa -  maṅgaḻa mūrati rūp ।

rāma lakhana sītā sahita - hṛdaya basahu surabhūp ॥

siyāvara rāmachandrakī jaya । pavanasuta hanumānakī jaya । bōlō bhāyī saba santanakī jaya ।
split_lines: pavana tanaya saṅkaṭa haraṇa -  maṅgaḻa mūrati rūp
rāma lakhana sītā sahita - hṛdaya basahu surabhūp
siyāvara rāmachandrakī jaya pavanasuta hanumānakī jaya bōlō bhāyī saba santanakī jaya

title: Verse 1
original:
nṛsiṃhakavachaṃ vakṣyē prahlādēnōditaṃ purā ।

sarvarakṣākaraṃ puṇyaṃ sarvōpadravanāśanam ॥ 1 ॥

title: Verse 2
original:
sarvasampatkaraṃ chaiva svargamōkṣapradāyakam ।

dhyātvā nṛsiṃhaṃ dēvēśaṃ hēmasiṃhāsanasthitam ॥ 2 ॥

title: Verse 3
original:
vivṛtāsyaṃ trinayanaṃ śaradindusamaprabham ।

lakṣmyāliṅgitavāmāṅgaṃ vibhūtibhirupāśritam ॥ 3 ॥

title: Verse 4
original:
chaturbhujaṃ kōmalāṅgaṃ svarṇakuṇḍalaśōbhitam ।

sarōjaśōbhitōraskaṃ ratnakēyūramudritam ॥ 4 ॥

title: Verse 5
original:
taptakāñchanasaṅkāśaṃ pītanirmalavāsanam ।

indrādisuramauḻisthasphuranmāṇikyadīptibhiḥ ॥ 5 ॥

title: Verse 6
original:
virājitapadadvandvaṃ śaṅkhachakrādihētibhiḥ ।

garutmatā savinayaṃ stūyamānaṃ mudānvitam ॥ 6 ॥

title: Verse 7
original:
svahṛtkamalasaṃvāsaṃ kṛtvā tu kavachaṃ paṭhēt ।

nṛsiṃhō mē śiraḥ pātu lōkarakṣātmasambhavaḥ ॥ 7 ॥

title: Verse 8
original:
sarvagō'pi stambhavāsaḥ phālaṃ mē rakṣatu dhvanim ।

nṛsiṃhō mē dṛśau pātu sōmasūryāgnilōchanaḥ ॥ 8 ॥
split_lines: sarvagō'pi stambhavāsaḥ phālaṃ mē rakṣatu dhvanim

title: Verse 9
original:
smṛtiṃ mē pātu nṛharirmunivaryastutipriyaḥ ।

nāsāṃ mē siṃhanāsastu mukhaṃ lakṣmīmukhapriyaḥ ॥ 9 ॥

title: Verse 10
original:
sarvavidyādhipaḥ pātu nṛsiṃhō rasanāṃ mama ।

vaktraṃ pātvinduvadanaḥ sadā prahlādavanditaḥ ॥ 10 ॥

title: Verse 11
original:
nṛsiṃhaḥ pātu mē kaṇṭhaṃ skandhau bhūbharaṇāntakṛt ।

divyāstraśōbhitabhujō nṛsiṃhaḥ pātu mē bhujau ॥ 11 ॥
split_lines: nṛsiṃhaḥ pātu mē kaṇṭhaṃ skandhau bhūbharaṇāntakṛt

title: Verse 12
original:
karau mē dēvavaradō nṛsiṃhaḥ pātu sarvataḥ ।

hṛdayaṃ yōgisādhyaścha nivāsaṃ pātu mē hariḥ ॥ 12 ॥
split_lines: karau mē dēvavaradō nṛsiṃhaḥ pātu sarvataḥ
hṛdayaṃ yōgisādhyaścha nivāsaṃ pātu mē hariḥ 12

title: Verse 13
original:
madhyaṃ pātu hiraṇyākṣavakṣaḥkukṣividāraṇaḥ ।

nābhiṃ mē pātu nṛhariḥ svanābhi brahmasaṃstutaḥ ॥ 13 ॥
split_lines: nābhiṃ mē pātu nṛhariḥ svanābhi brahmasaṃstutaḥ 13

title: Verse 14
original:
brahmāṇḍakōṭayaḥ kaṭyāṃ yasyāsau pātu mē kaṭim ।

guhyaṃ mē pātu guhyānāṃ mantrāṇāṃ guhyarūpadhṛk ॥ 14 ॥
split_lines: brahmāṇḍakōṭayaḥ kaṭyāṃ yasyāsau pātu mē kaṭim
guhyaṃ mē pātu guhyānāṃ mantrāṇāṃ guhyarūpadhṛk 14

title: Verse 15
original:
ūrū manōbhavaḥ pātu jānunī nararūpadhṛk ।

jaṅghē pātu dharābhārahartā yō'sau nṛkēsarī ॥ 15 ॥

title: Verse 16
original:
surarājyapradaḥ pātu pādau mē nṛharīśvaraḥ ।

sahasraśīrṣā puruṣaḥ pātu mē sarvaśastanum ॥ 16 ॥

title: Verse 17
original:
mahōgraḥ pūrvataḥ pātu mahāvīrāgrajō'gnitaḥ ।

mahāviṣṇurdakṣiṇē tu mahājvālastu nairṛtau ॥ 17 ॥

title: Verse 18
original:
paśchimē pātu sarvēśō diśi mē sarvatōmukhaḥ ।

nṛsiṃhaḥ pātu vāyavyāṃ saumyāṃ bhūṣaṇavigrahaḥ ॥ 18 ॥
split_lines: paśchimē pātu sarvēśō diśi mē sarvatōmukhaḥ

title: Verse 19
original:
īśānyāṃ pātu bhadrō mē sarvamaṅgaḻadāyakaḥ ।

saṃsārabhayadaḥ pātu mṛtyōrmṛtyurnṛkēsarī ॥ 19 ॥

title: Verse 20
original:
idaṃ nṛsiṃhakavachaṃ prahlādamukhamaṇḍitam ।

bhaktimānyaḥ paṭhēnnityaṃ sarvapāpaiḥ pramuchyatē ॥ 20 ॥

title: Verse 21
original:
putravān dhanavān lōkē dīrghāyurupajāyatē ।

yaṃ yaṃ kāmayatē kāmaṃ taṃ taṃ prāpnōtyasaṃśayam ॥ 21 ॥
split_lines: yaṃ yaṃ kāmayatē kāmaṃ taṃ taṃ prāpnōtyasaṃśayam 21

title: Verse 22
original:
sarvatra jayamāpnōti sarvatra vijayī bhavēt ।

bhūmyantarikṣadivyānāṃ grahāṇāṃ vinivāraṇam ॥ 22 ॥

title: Verse 23
original:
vṛśchikōragasambhūtaviṣāpaharaṇaṃ param ।

brahmarākṣasayakṣāṇāṃ dūrōtsāraṇakāraṇam ॥ 23 ॥

title: Verse 24
original:
bhūrjē vā tāḻapatrē vā kavachaṃ likhitaṃ śubham ।

karamūlē dhṛtaṃ yēna sidhyēyuḥ karmasiddhayaḥ ॥ 24 ॥
split_lines: bhūrjē vā tāḻapatrē vā kavachaṃ likhitaṃ śubham

title: Verse 25
original:
dēvāsuramanuṣyēṣu svaṃ svamēva jayaṃ labhēt ।

ēkasandhyaṃ trisandhyaṃ vā yaḥ paṭhēnniyatō naraḥ ॥ 25 ॥
split_lines: ēkasandhyaṃ trisandhyaṃ vā yaḥ paṭhēnniyatō naraḥ 25

title: Verse 26
original:
sarvamaṅgaḻamāṅgaḻyaṃ bhuktiṃ muktiṃ cha vindati ।

dvātriṃśatisahasrāṇi paṭhēchChuddhātmanāṃ nṛṇām ॥ 26 ॥

title: Verse 27
original:
kavachasyāsya mantrasya mantrasiddhiḥ prajāyatē ।

anēna mantrarājēna kṛtvā bhasmābhimantraṇam ॥ 27 ॥

title: Verse 28
original:
tilakaṃ vinyasēdyastu tasya grahabhayaṃ harēt ।

trivāraṃ japamānastu dattaṃ vāryabhimantrya cha ॥ 28 ॥

title: Verse 29
original:
prāśayēdyō narō mantraṃ nṛsiṃhadhyānamācharēt ।

tasya rōgāḥ praṇaśyanti yē cha syuḥ kukṣisambhavāḥ ॥ 29 ॥
split_lines: tasya rōgāḥ praṇaśyanti yē cha syuḥ kukṣisambhavāḥ 29

title: Verse 30
original:
kimatra bahunōktēna nṛsiṃhasadṛśō bhavēt ।

manasā chintitaṃ yattu sa tachchāpnōtyasaṃśayam ॥ 30 ॥

title: Verse 31
original:
garjantaṃ garjayantaṃ nijabhujapaṭalaṃ sphōṭayantaṃ haṭhantaṃ

rūpyantaṃ tāpayantaṃ divi bhuvi ditijaṃ kṣēpayantaṃ kṣipantam ।

krandantaṃ rōṣayantaṃ diśi diśi satataṃ saṃharantaṃ bharantaṃ

vīkṣantaṃ ghūrṇayantaṃ śaranikaraśatairdivyasiṃhaṃ namāmi ॥
split_lines: rūpyantaṃ tāpayantaṃ divi bhuvi ditijaṃ kṣēpayantaṃ kṣipantam
krandantaṃ rōṣayantaṃ diśi diśi satataṃ saṃharantaṃ bharantaṃ

title: Verse 32
original: iti śrībrahmāṇḍapurāṇē prahlādōktaṃ śrī nṛsiṃha kavacham ।
split_lines: iti śrībrahmāṇḍapurāṇē prahlādōktaṃ śrī nṛsiṃha kavacham

title: Verse 1
original:
dēvō naḥ śubhamātanōtu daśadhā nirvartayan bhūmikāṁ raṅgē dhāmani labdhanirbhararasairadhyakṣitō bhāvukaiḥ
yadbhāvēṣu pr̥thagvidhēṣvanuguṇān bhāvān svayaṁ bibhratī yaddharmairiha dharmiṇī viharatē nānākr̥tirnāyikā
1
split_lines: dēvō naḥ śubhamātanōtu daśadhā nirvartayan bhūmikāṁ raṅgē dhāmani labdhanirbhararasairadhyakṣitō bhāvukaiḥ
yadbhāvēṣu pr̥thagvidhēṣvanuguṇān bhāvān svayaṁ bibhratī yaddharmairiha dharmiṇī viharatē nānākr̥tirnāyikā

title: Verse 2
original:
nirmagnaśrutijālamārgaṇadaśādattakṣaṇairvīkṣaṇai- -rantastanvadivāravindamahanānyaudanvatīnāmapām
niṣpratyūhataraṅgariṅgaṇamithaḥ pratyūḍhapāthaśchaṭā- -ḍōlārōhasadōhalaṁ bhagavatō mātsyaṁ vapuḥ pātu naḥ
2
split_lines: niṣpratyūhataraṅgariṅgaṇamithaḥ pratyūḍhapāthaśchaṭā- -ḍōlārōhasadōhalaṁ bhagavatō mātsyaṁ vapuḥ pātu naḥ

title: Verse 3
original:
avyāsurbhuvanatrayīmanibhr̥taṁ kaṇḍūyanairadriṇā nidrāṇasya parasya kūrmavapuṣō niḥśvāsavātōrmayaḥ
yadvikṣēpaṇasaṁskr̥tōdadhipayaḥ prēṅkhōlaparyaṅkikā- -nityārōhaṇanirvr̥tō viharatē dēvaḥ sahaiva śriyā
3
split_lines: avyāsurbhuvanatrayīmanibhr̥taṁ kaṇḍūyanairadriṇā nidrāṇasya parasya kūrmavapuṣō niḥśvāsavātōrmayaḥ
yadvikṣēpaṇasaṁskr̥tōdadhipayaḥ prēṅkhōlaparyaṅkikā- -nityārōhaṇanirvr̥tō viharatē dēvaḥ sahaiva śriyā

title: Verse 4
original:
gōpāyēdaniśaṁ jaganti kuhanāpōtrī pavitrīkr̥ta- -brahmāṇḍaḥ pralayōrmighōṣagurubhirghōṇāravairghurghuraiḥ
yaddaṁṣṭrāṅkurakōṭigāḍhaghaṭanāniṣkampanityasthiti- -rbrahmastambamasaudasau bhagavatī mustēva viśvambharā
4

title: Verse 5
original:
pratyādiṣṭapurātanapraharaṇagrāmaḥ kṣaṇaṁ pāṇijai- -ravyāt trīṇi jagantyakuṇṭhamahimā vaikuṇṭhakaṇṭhīravaḥ
yatprādurbhavanādavandhyajaṭharā yādr̥cchikādvēdhasāṁ yā kācit sahasā mahāsuragr̥hasthūṇā pitāmahyabhūt
5
split_lines: pratyādiṣṭapurātanapraharaṇagrāmaḥ kṣaṇaṁ pāṇijai- -ravyāt trīṇi jagantyakuṇṭhamahimā vaikuṇṭhakaṇṭhīravaḥ
yatprādurbhavanādavandhyajaṭharā yādr̥cchikādvēdhasāṁ yā kācit sahasā mahāsuragr̥hasthūṇā pitāmahyabhūt

title: Verse 6
original:
vrīḍāviddhavadānyadānavayaśōnāsīradhāṭībhaṭaḥ traiyakṣaṁ mukuṭaṁ punannavatu nastraivikramō vikramaḥ
yatprastāvasamucchritadhvajapaṭīvr̥ttāntasiddhāntibhiḥ srōtōbhiḥ surasindhuraṣṭasu diśāsaudhēṣu dōdhūyatē
6

title: Verse 7
original:
krōdhāgniṁ jamadagnipīḍanabhavaṁ santarpayiṣyan kramā- -dakṣatrāmiha santatakṣa ya imāṁ triḥsaptakr̥tvaḥ kṣitim
dattvā karmaṇi dakṣiṇāṁ kvacana tāmāskandya sindhuṁ vasan abrahmaṇyamapākarōtu bhagavānābrahmakīṭaṁ muniḥ
7
split_lines: krōdhāgniṁ jamadagnipīḍanabhavaṁ santarpayiṣyan kramā- -dakṣatrāmiha santatakṣa ya imāṁ triḥsaptakr̥tvaḥ kṣitim
dattvā karmaṇi dakṣiṇāṁ kvacana tāmāskandya sindhuṁ vasan abrahmaṇyamapākarōtu bhagavānābrahmakīṭaṁ muniḥ

title: Verse 8
original:
pārāvārapayōviśōṣaṇakalāpārīṇakālānala- -jvālājālavihārahāriviśikhavyāpāraghōrakramaḥ
sarvāvasthasakr̥tprapannajanatāsaṁrakṣaṇaikavratī dharmō vigrahavānadharmaviratiṁ dhanvī sa tanvīta naḥ
8
split_lines: sarvāvasthasakr̥tprapannajanatāsaṁrakṣaṇaikavratī dharmō vigrahavānadharmaviratiṁ dhanvī sa tanvīta naḥ

title: Verse 9
original:
phakkatkauravapaṭ-ṭaṇaprabhr̥tayaḥ prāstapralambādaya- -stālāṅkasya tathāvidhā vihr̥tayastanvantu bhadrāṇi naḥ
kṣīraṁ śarkarayēva yābhirapr̥thagbhūtāḥ prabhūtairguṇai- -rākaumārakamasvadanta jagatē kr̥ṣṇasya tāḥ kēlayaḥ
9
split_lines: phakkatkauravapaṭ-ṭaṇaprabhr̥tayaḥ prāstapralambādaya- -stālāṅkasya tathāvidhā vihr̥tayastanvantu bhadrāṇi naḥ
kṣīraṁ śarkarayēva yābhirapr̥thagbhūtāḥ prabhūtairguṇai- -rākaumārakamasvadanta jagatē kr̥ṣṇasya tāḥ kēlayaḥ

title: Verse 10
original:
nāthāyaiva namaḥ padaṁ bhavatu naścitraiścaritrakramai- -rbhūyōbhirbhuvanānyamūni kuhanāgōpāya gōpāyatē
kālindīrasikāya kāliyaphaṇisphārasphaṭāvāṭikā- -raṅgōtsaṅgaviśaṅkacakramadhurāparyāyacaryāya tē
10
split_lines: nāthāyaiva namaḥ padaṁ bhavatu naścitraiścaritrakramai- -rbhūyōbhirbhuvanānyamūni kuhanāgōpāya gōpāyatē

title: Verse 11
original:
bhāvinyā daśayā bhavanniha bhavadhvaṁsāya naḥ kalpatāṁ kalkī viṣṇuyaśaḥ sutaḥ kalikathākāluṣyakūlaṅkaṣaḥ
niḥśēṣakṣatakaṇṭakē kṣititalē dhārājalaughairdhruvaṁ dharmaṁ kārtayugaṁ prarōhayati yannistriṁśadhārādharaḥ
11
split_lines: bhāvinyā daśayā bhavanniha bhavadhvaṁsāya naḥ kalpatāṁ kalkī viṣṇuyaśaḥ sutaḥ kalikathākāluṣyakūlaṅkaṣaḥ
niḥśēṣakṣatakaṇṭakē kṣititalē dhārājalaughairdhruvaṁ dharmaṁ kārtayugaṁ prarōhayati yannistriṁśadhārādharaḥ

title: Verse 12
original:
icchāmīna vihārakacchapa mahāpōtrin yadr̥cchāharē rakṣāvāmana rōṣarāma karuṇākākutstha hēlāhalin
krīḍāvallava kalkavāhana daśākalkinniti pratyahaṁ jalpantaḥ puruṣāḥ punanti bhuvanaṁ puṇyaughapaṇyāpaṇāḥ
12
split_lines: icchāmīna vihārakacchapa mahāpōtrin yadr̥cchāharē rakṣāvāmana rōṣarāma karuṇākākutstha hēlāhalin
krīḍāvallava kalkavāhana daśākalkinniti pratyahaṁ jalpantaḥ puruṣāḥ punanti bhuvanaṁ puṇyaughapaṇyāpaṇāḥ

title: Verse 13
original:
vidyōdanvati vēṅkaṭēśvarakavau jātaṁ jaganmaṅgalaṁ dēvēśasya daśāvatāraviṣayaṁ stōtraṁ vivakṣēta yaḥ
vaktraṁ tasya sarasvatī bahumukhī bhaktiḥ parā mānasē śuddhiḥ kā:’pi tanau diśāsu daśasu khyātiḥ śubhā jr̥mbhatē
13
split_lines: vidyōdanvati vēṅkaṭēśvarakavau jātaṁ jaganmaṅgalaṁ dēvēśasya daśāvatāraviṣayaṁ stōtraṁ vivakṣēta yaḥ
vaktraṁ tasya sarasvatī bahumukhī bhaktiḥ parā mānasē śuddhiḥ kā:’pi tanau diśāsu daśasu khyātiḥ śubhā jr̥mbhatē

title: Verse 1
original:
vasudēva sutaṃ dēvaṃ kaṃsa chāṇūra mardanam ।

dēvakī paramānandaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ vandē jagadgurum ॥
split_lines: vasudēva sutaṃ dēvaṃ kaṃsa chāṇūra mardanam

title: Verse 2
original:
atasī puṣpa saṅkāśaṃ hāra nūpura śōbhitam ।

ratna kaṅkaṇa kēyūraṃ kṛṣṇaṃ vandē jagadgurum ॥
split_lines: atasī puṣpa saṅkāśaṃ hāra nūpura śōbhitam
ratna kaṅkaṇa kēyūraṃ kṛṣṇaṃ vandē jagadgurum

title: Verse 3
original:
kuṭilālaka saṃyuktaṃ pūrṇachandra nibhānanam ।

vilasat kuṇḍaladharaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ vandē jagadguram ॥

title: Verse 4
original:
mandāra gandha saṃyuktaṃ chāruhāsaṃ chaturbhujam ।

barhi piñChāva chūḍāṅgaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ vandē jagadgurum ॥
split_lines: barhi piñChāva chūḍāṅgaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ vandē jagadgurum

title: Verse 5
original:
utphulla padmapatrākṣaṃ nīla jīmūta sannibham ।

yādavānāṃ śirōratnaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ vandē jagadgurum ॥

title: Verse 6
original:
rukmiṇī kēḻi saṃyuktaṃ pītāmbara suśōbhitam ।

avāpta tulasī gandhaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ vandē jagadgurum ॥
split_lines: avāpta tulasī gandhaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ vandē jagadgurum

title: Verse 7
original:
gōpikānāṃ kuchadvanda kuṅkumāṅkita vakṣasam ।

śrīnikētaṃ mahēṣvāsaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ vandē jagadgurum ॥

title: Verse 8
original:
śrīvatsāṅkaṃ mahōraskaṃ vanamālā virājitam ।

śaṅkhachakra dharaṃ dēvaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ vandē jagadgurum ॥
split_lines: śaṅkhachakra dharaṃ dēvaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ vandē jagadgurum

title: Verse 9
original:
kṛṣṇāṣṭaka midaṃ puṇyaṃ prātarutthāya yaḥ paṭhēt ।

kōṭijanma kṛtaṃ pāpaṃ smaraṇēna vinaśyati ॥
split_lines: kṛṣṇāṣṭaka midaṃ puṇyaṃ prātarutthāya yaḥ paṭhēt

title: Verse 1
original:
auṣadhē cintayēdviṣṇuṁ bhōjanē ca janārdanam
śayanē padmanābhaṁ ca vivāhē ca prajāpatim
1
split_lines: śayanē padmanābhaṁ ca vivāhē ca prajāpatim

title: Verse 2
original:
yuddhē cakradharaṁ dēvaṁ pravāsē ca trivikramam
nārāyaṇaṁ tanutyāgē śrīdharaṁ priyasaṅgamē
2
split_lines: yuddhē cakradharaṁ dēvaṁ pravāsē ca trivikramam

title: Verse 3
original:
dussvapnē smara gōvindaṁ saṅkaṭē madhusūdanam
kānanē nārasiṁhaṁ ca pāvakē jalaśāyinam
3

title: Verse 4
original:
jalamadhyē varāhaṁ ca parvatē raghunandanam
gamanē vāmanaṁ caiva sarvakālēṣu mādhavam
4

title: Verse 5
original:
ṣōḍaśaitāni nāmāni prātarūtthāya yaḥ paṭhēt
sarvapāpavinirmuktō viṣṇulōkē mahīyatē
5

title: Verse 1
original:
namaḥ pannaganaddhāya vaikuṇṭhavaśavartinē
śrutisindhusudhōtpādamandarāya garutmatē

title: Verse 1
original:
garuḍamakhilavēdanīḍādhirūḍhaṁ dviṣatpīḍanōtkaṇṭhitākuṇṭha vaikuṇṭhapīṭhīkr̥ta skandhamīḍē svanīḍā gatiprītarudrā sukīrtistanābhōga gāḍhōpagūḍhaṁ sphuratkaṇṭaka vrāta vēdhavyathā vēpamāna dvijihvādhipā kalpaviṣphāryamāṇa sphaṭāvāṭikā ratnarōciśchaṭā rājinīrājitaṁ kāntikallōlinī rājitam
1
split_lines: garuḍamakhilavēdanīḍādhirūḍhaṁ dviṣatpīḍanōtkaṇṭhitākuṇṭha vaikuṇṭhapīṭhīkr̥ta skandhamīḍē svanīḍā gatiprītarudrā sukīrtistanābhōga gāḍhōpagūḍhaṁ sphuratkaṇṭaka vrāta vēdhavyathā vēpamāna dvijihvādhipā kalpaviṣphāryamāṇa sphaṭāvāṭikā ratnarōciśchaṭā rājinīrājitaṁ kāntikallōlinī rājitam

title: Verse 2
original:
jaya garuḍa suparṇa darvīkarāhāra dēvādhipā hārahārin divaukaspati kṣiptadambhōli dhārākiṇā kalpakalpānta vātūla kalpōdayānalpa vīrāyitōdyat camatkāra daityāri jaitradhvajārōha nirdhāritōtkarṣa saṅkarṣaṇātman garutman marutpañcakādhīśa satyādimūrtē na kaścit samastē namastē punastē namaḥ
2
split_lines: jaya garuḍa suparṇa darvīkarāhāra dēvādhipā hārahārin divaukaspati kṣiptadambhōli dhārākiṇā kalpakalpānta vātūla kalpōdayānalpa vīrāyitōdyat camatkāra daityāri jaitradhvajārōha nirdhāritōtkarṣa saṅkarṣaṇātman garutman marutpañcakādhīśa satyādimūrtē na kaścit samastē namastē punastē namaḥ

title: Verse 3
original:
nama idamajahat saparyāya paryāyaniryāta pakṣānilāsphālanōdvēlapāthōdhi vīcī capēṭāhatā gādha pātāla bhāṅkāra saṅkruddha nāgēndra pīḍā sr̥ṇībhāva bhāsvannakhaśrēṇayē caṇḍa tuṇḍāya nr̥tyadbhujaṅgabhruvē vajriṇē daṁṣṭrayā tubhyamadhyātmavidyā vidhēyā vidhēyā bhavaddāsyamāpādayēthā dayēthāśca mē
3
split_lines: nama idamajahat saparyāya paryāyaniryāta pakṣānilāsphālanōdvēlapāthōdhi vīcī capēṭāhatā gādha pātāla bhāṅkāra saṅkruddha nāgēndra pīḍā sr̥ṇībhāva bhāsvannakhaśrēṇayē caṇḍa tuṇḍāya nr̥tyadbhujaṅgabhruvē vajriṇē daṁṣṭrayā tubhyamadhyātmavidyā vidhēyā vidhēyā bhavaddāsyamāpādayēthā dayēthāśca mē

title: Verse 4
original:
manuranugata pakṣivaktra sphurattārakastāvakaścitrabhānupriyā śēkharastrāyatāṁ nastrivargāpavarga prasūtiḥ paravyōmadhāman valadvēṣidarpa jvaladvālakhilya pratijñāvatīrṇa sthirāṁ tattvabuddhiṁ parāṁ bhaktidhēnuṁ jaganmūlakandē mukundē mahānandadōgdhrīṁ dadhīthā mudhā kāmahīnāmahīnāmahīnāntaka
4
split_lines: manuranugata pakṣivaktra sphurattārakastāvakaścitrabhānupriyā śēkharastrāyatāṁ nastrivargāpavarga prasūtiḥ paravyōmadhāman valadvēṣidarpa jvaladvālakhilya pratijñāvatīrṇa sthirāṁ tattvabuddhiṁ parāṁ bhaktidhēnuṁ jaganmūlakandē mukundē mahānandadōgdhrīṁ dadhīthā mudhā kāmahīnāmahīnāmahīnāntaka

title: Verse 5
original:
ṣaṭtriṁśadgaṇacaraṇō naraparipāṭīnavīnagumbhagaṇaḥ
viṣṇurathadaṇḍakō:’yaṁ vighaṭayatu vipakṣavāhinīvyūham
5

title: Verse 6
original:
vicitrasiddhidaḥ sō:’yaṁ vēṅkaṭēśavipaścitā
garuḍadhvajatōṣāya gītō garuḍadaṇḍakaḥ
6

title: Verse 7
original:
kavitārkikasiṁhāya kalyāṇaguṇaśālinē
śrīmatē vēṅkaṭēśāya vēdāntaguravē namaḥ

title: Verse 8
original: śrīmatē nigamāntamahādēśikāya namaḥ

title: Verse 1
original:
ahaṁ madrakṣaṇabharō madrakṣaṇaphalaṁ tathā
na mama śrīpatērēvētyātmānaṁ nikṣipēt budhaḥ
1

title: Verse 2
original:
nyasyāmyakiñcanaḥ śrīman anukūlō:’nyavarjitaḥ
viśvāsaprārthanāpūrvaṁ ātmarakṣābharaṁ tvayi
2

title: Verse 3
original:
svāmī svaśēṣaṁ svavaśaṁ svabharatvēna nirbharam
svadattasvadhiyā svārthaṁ svasmin nyasyati māṁ svayam
3
split_lines: svadattasvadhiyā svārthaṁ svasmin nyasyati māṁ svayam

title: Verse 4
original:
śrīmannabhīṣṭavarada tvāmasmi śaraṇaṁ gataḥ
ētaddēhāvasānē māṁ tvatpādaṁ prāpaya svayam
4

title: Verse 5
original:
tvacchēṣatvē sthiradhiyaṁ tvat prāptyēkaprayōjanam
niṣiddhakāmyarahitaṁ kuru māṁ nityakiṅkaram
5

title: Verse 6
original:
dēvībhūṣaṇahētyādijuṣṭasya bhagavaṁstava
nityaṁ niraparādhēṣu kaiṅkaryēṣu niyuṅkṣva mām
6

title: Verse 7
original:
māṁ madīyaṁ ca nikhilaṁ cētanā:’cētanātmakam
svakaiṅkaryōpakaraṇaṁ varada svīkuru svayam
7

title: Verse 8
original:
tvadēkarakṣyasya mama tvamēva karuṇākara
na pravartaya pāpāni pravr̥ttāni nivartaya
8

title: Verse 9
original:
akr̥tyānāṁ ca karaṇaṁ kr̥tyānāṁ varjanaṁ ca mē
kṣamasva nikhilaṁ dēva praṇatārtihara prabhō
9
split_lines: akr̥tyānāṁ ca karaṇaṁ kr̥tyānāṁ varjanaṁ ca mē

title: Verse 10
original:
śrīmān niyatapañcāṅgaṁ madrakṣaṇabharārpaṇam
acīkarat svayaṁ svasmin atō:’hamiha nirbharaḥ
10

title: Verse 11
original:
maṅgalaślōkaḥ – saṁsārāvartavēgapraśamanaśubhadr̥gdēśikaprēkṣitōhaṁ santyaktōnyairupāyairanucitacaritēśvadya śāntābhisandhiḥ
niśśaṅkastattvadr̥ṣṭvā niravadhikadayaṁ prārthya saṁrakṣakaṁ tvāṁ nyasya tvatpādapadmē varada nijabharaṁ nirbharō nirbhayōsmi
split_lines: niśśaṅkastattvadr̥ṣṭvā niravadhikadayaṁ prārthya saṁrakṣakaṁ tvāṁ nyasya tvatpādapadmē varada nijabharaṁ nirbharō nirbhayōsmi

title: Verse 12
original: See more [śrī viṣṇu stōtrāṇi](https://stotranidhi.com/en/stotras-list-english/sri-vishnu-stotrani-english/) for chanting.

title: Verse 2
original:
viṣṇōrmukhōtthānilapūritasya yasya dhvanirdānavadarpahantā
taṁ pāñcajanyaṁ śaśikōṭiśubhraṁ śaṅkhaṁ sadā:’haṁ śaraṇaṁ prapadyē
2
split_lines: taṁ pāñcajanyaṁ śaśikōṭiśubhraṁ śaṅkhaṁ sadā:’haṁ śaraṇaṁ prapadyē

title: Verse 3
original:
hiraṇmayīṁ mērusamānasārāṁ kaumōdakīṁ daityakulaikahantrīm
vaikuṇṭhavāmāgrakarābhimr̥ṣṭāṁ gadāṁ sadā:’haṁ śaraṇaṁ prapadyē
3

title: Verse 4
original:
rakṣō:’surāṇāṁ kaṭhinōgrakaṇṭha- -cchēdakṣaracchōṇitadigdhadhāram
taṁ nandakaṁ nāma harēḥ pradīptaṁ khaḍgaṁ sadā:’haṁ śaraṇaṁ prapadyē
4
split_lines: taṁ nandakaṁ nāma harēḥ pradīptaṁ khaḍgaṁ sadā:’haṁ śaraṇaṁ prapadyē

title: Verse 5
original:
yajjyāninādaśravaṇāt surāṇāṁ cētāṁsi nirmuktabhayāni sadyaḥ
bhavanti daityāśanibāṇavarṣi śārṅgaṁ sadā:’haṁ śaraṇaṁ prapadyē
5
split_lines: bhavanti daityāśanibāṇavarṣi śārṅgaṁ sadā:’haṁ śaraṇaṁ prapadyē

title: Verse 6
original:
imaṁ harēḥ pañcamahāyudhānāṁ stavaṁ paṭhēdyō:’nudinaṁ prabhātē
samastaduḥkhāni bhayāni sadyaḥ pāpāni naśyanti sukhāni santi
6
split_lines: imaṁ harēḥ pañcamahāyudhānāṁ stavaṁ paṭhēdyō:’nudinaṁ prabhātē
samastaduḥkhāni bhayāni sadyaḥ pāpāni naśyanti sukhāni santi

title: Verse 7
original:
vanē raṇē śatru jalāgnimadhyē yadr̥cchayāpatsu mahābhayēṣu
idaṁ paṭhan stōtramanākulātmā sukhī bhavēt tatkr̥ta sarvarakṣaḥ
7
split_lines: vanē raṇē śatru jalāgnimadhyē yadr̥cchayāpatsu mahābhayēṣu
idaṁ paṭhan stōtramanākulātmā sukhī bhavēt tatkr̥ta sarvarakṣaḥ
